summary: The batch of synthetic samples demonstrates a good variety of intents, difficulties, ambiguities, and styles, but there are some missing noise types and a few near-duplicate phrasings. The overall diversity is high, but attention is needed on noise representation and avoiding redundancy.
recommendations: Ensure that all noise types are represented in future samples.
Introduce more edge cases and rare scenarios to enhance diversity.
Review and reduce near-duplicate phrasings to improve uniqueness.
